error_signature: N8N_EXPERIMENTAL_FEATURES_ENABLED=true not needed for Text Classifier
title: Unnecessary experimental features flag for Text Classifier
symptom: The user has set the environment variable for experimental features, but it is not required for the Text Classifier node.
applies_when: Using n8n with experimental features enabled
Trying to access the Text Classifier node
not_this_if: Text Classifier node is still missing after pulling the latest image
root_cause: The Text Classifier node is part of the stable version of n8n and does not require the experimental features flag to be enabled. This can lead to confusion about its availability.
fix_steps: Remove the line `N8N_EXPERIMENTAL_FEATURES_ENABLED=true` from your Docker environment configuration
Restart the Docker Compose setup to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Remove the experimental features flag from the configuration and restart Docker Compose.
